description: The token auto-provisioning code was added manually to Config::ensure_token_exists in protocol/src/config.rs and called from runner_helpers.rs. However, there's no test that exercises the full daemon→runner startup path end-to-end with token generation. Add an integration test that starts from a fresh config dir with no token set, calls ensure_agent_runner_running, and verifies the runner starts successfully with a generated token. Also consider whether the token should rotate periodically for security.
title: Auto-provision IPC auth token in ensure_agent_runner_running
